info.title: Freshdesk
info.description: Freshdesk is a cloud-based customer support platform. This connector provides access to tickets, contacts, companies, conversations, agents, and groups via typed operations for Power Automate and an MCP endpoint for Copilot Studio.

post.description: Bridges MCP requests to the Freshdesk API and returns responses.

get.description: List all tickets. Use filters to view only specific tickets.

parameters.name: updated_since
parameters.description: Return tickets updated since this timestamp.

post.description: Create a new support ticket.

requester_id.description: User ID of an existing requester.

responder_id.description: ID of the agent to assign.

group_id.description: ID of the group to assign.

parent_id.description: Parent ticket ID for child tickets.

custom_fields.description: Key-value pairs of custom field names and values.

get.description: Retrieve a specific ticket by ID.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Embed additional details (conversations, requester, company, stats).

custom_fields.description: Key-value pairs of custom field names and values.

delete.description: Soft-delete a ticket. Can be restored later.

get.description: Search tickets using a query string. Format: "(field:value) AND/OR (field:value)".

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Query string enclosed in double quotes. Example: "priority:3 AND status:2".

get.description: List all ticket fields including custom fields.

default.description: True if not a custom field.

get.description: List all conversations (replies and notes) of a ticket.
List all time entries for a ticket.

post.description: Reply to a ticket.
Add a note to a ticket.

notify_emails.description: Emails to notify about this note.

get.description: List all contacts with optional filters.

post.description: Create a new contact.

get.description: Retrieve a contact by ID.
Search contacts using a query string.
List all companies.

post.description: Create a new company.

get.description: Retrieve a company by ID.
List all agents with optional filters.
Retrieve an agent by ID.
Retrieve the currently authenticated agent.
List all groups.

post.description: Create a new agent group.

get.description: Retrieve a group by ID.
List all solution categories.

post.description: Create a new solution category.

get.description: Retrieve a solution category by ID.

delete.description: Delete a solution category and all translations.

get.description: List all solution folders in a category.

post.description: Create a new solution folder in a category.

get.description: Retrieve a solution folder by ID.

delete.description: Delete a solution folder and all translations.

get.description: List all articles in a solution folder.

post.description: Create a new knowledge base article in a folder.

get.description: Retrieve a solution article by ID.

delete.description: Delete a solution article and all translations.

get.description: Search knowledge base articles by keyword.
List all time entries with optional filters.

post.description: Create a time entry for a ticket.

put.description: Start or stop a time entry timer.

get.description: List all SLA policies.
List all products.
Retrieve a product by ID.
List all business hour configurations.
Retrieve a business hour configuration by ID.
List all forum categories.

post.description: Create a new forum category.

get.description: Retrieve a forum category by ID.
List all forums in a category.

post.description: Create a forum in a category.

get.description: Retrieve a forum by ID.
List all topics in a forum.

post.description: Create a topic in a forum.

get.description: Retrieve a topic by ID.
List all comments in a topic.

post.description: Add a comment to a topic.

get.description: List all agent roles.
Retrieve a role by ID.
List all canned response folders.
List all canned responses in a folder.
Retrieve a canned response by ID.

post.description: Create a new canned response.

get.description: List all scenario automations.
List all customer satisfaction surveys.
List all satisfaction ratings.

post.description: Forward a ticket to an external email address.

put.description: Merge secondary tickets into a primary ticket.

ticket_ids.description: All ticket IDs to merge (includes primary).

get.description: List all watchers on a ticket.

post.description: Add a watcher to a ticket.

put.description: Remove yourself as watcher from a ticket.

delete.description: Permanently delete a contact (GDPR). All tickets will also be deleted.

post.description: Merge secondary contacts into a primary contact.

get.description: Search contacts by name (autocomplete).
Search companies using a query string.
Search companies by name (autocomplete).

post.description: Create a new agent.

get.description: Search agents by name or email.

delete.description: Delete a group (agents are not deleted).

get.description: List all skills.

post.description: Create a new skill.

get.description: Retrieve a skill by ID.
Retrieve account details including plan, agents, and timezone.

get.description: Retrieve a custom object record by ID.

post.description: Update multiple tickets at once. Returns a job ID.
